Text: Had to flee my home, but all seems quiet now. Apparently the horde moved on.
Hey! I'm at Stephansplatz and just saw a huge crowd of... zombies?! No kidding!
Hietzinger Hauptstraße is a zombie hotspot right now. Do we have an apocalypse on our hands?
I have to report a large aggregation of zombies. My world is turning upside down.
I went to bed early, but was awoken by loud noises in the street. Tons of Zombies outside, I don't know what to do!
Just saw a load of zombies in Winkl. I freed the alpacas.
Museumquartier is a mess right now, full of zombies! This can't be real, can it?
OMG. I just saw the hugest bunch of Zombies shuffling through the neighbourhood.
Purkersdorf is a mess. There's a massive horde of zombies, it's scary!
Seeing lots of zombies on Linzer Straße, Gablitz. Stay indoors, folks!
So many zombies outside, shuffling through the dark. Where could they be heading?
So, Pressbaum is the new zombie capital? They're swarming Hauptstraße!
The whole Herrengasse is swarmed by what looks like zombies. Terrifying!
We are abandoning the Stadium, it is no longer safe. Massive zombie horde sighted.
Zombies are overrunning Rathausplatz. What's next, aliens?
Zombies are swarming in from all directions. Even from the forest. Safe yourselves, avoid Pressbaum.
Zombies everywhere, I can't escape! This is a nightmare!
